## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Homebase teams to discuss content strategy and collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Excitement around recent in-person presentation and interest in building on that momentum](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Opportunity to further integrate processes and enable more seamless collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Desire to understand each other's workflows and identify areas for automation/optimization](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Potential to leverage airtable or other tools as a centralized content database](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)

## Topics

### Recent In-Person Presentation

  - [Kyle shared positive feedback on the presentation, noting it generated good engagement and interest](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Opportunity to build on that energy and impact by enabling further content creation/experiences](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)

### Integrating Processes

  - [Discussion on how GrowthX (Marcel's team) can better plug into Homebase's content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Kerry open to sharing her process/templates to identify integration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Potential to use airtable or adapt GrowthX's database as a centralized content hub](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)

### Content Database Needs

  - [Kerry has an existing database she uses as a post-publication source of truth](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Interested in automating updates to certain columns and having GrowthX optimize/integrate](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Opportunity to cross-compare database needs and merge into one streamlined solution](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

### Resourcing and Responsibilities

  - [Clarifying Kerry's vision for how to best leverage GrowthX's AI capabilities vs. human reviewers](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [GrowthX eager to take on more human review/optimization tasks if needed](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to dive deeper into workflows and database integration](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [Kerry to process feedback and share more context on her process/vision](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more examples of how they support other client programs](https://fathom.video/share/rzmDvVL6eZzTAM1-NqPZUaEMGfTXsLbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
